name: Artie Schroeck
abstract: Arthur Bruce Schroeck (born October 10, 1938) is an American musician, best known for arranging and composing popular songs and jingles. He has won multiple Clio Awards, such as when he composed the music for the 1981 ABC-TV promo "Now is the time, ABC is the place".

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Calello
about_quotes.evidence: I gave them to Artie Schroeck to orchestrate. Now Artie was doing my sessions.
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Calello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 21, 2025
